description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and defines the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Add a global before_script that changes to the src directory and runs bundle install. Define two stages, test and deploy, and in the test stage add a test job that executes jekyll build -d test, stores the src/test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs jekyll build -d public followed by mv public .., publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. No caches or services are used.
